name: Loco
description: Loco — Localization management platform (localise.biz) with REST API, file format support, and translation memory.

seo.title: Loco — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Loco: Loco — Localization management platform (localise.biz) with REST API, file format support, and translation memory.

when_to_use: Localization REST API for mobile app string management
Translation memory and glossary for consistent output
Multi-format file export: iOS strings, Android XML, JSON
Git-integrated localization workflow for dev teams

pros: Clean REST API and CLI for i18n file sync
Good range of file formats (JSON, YAML, .po, etc.)
Free tier usable for small projects
Lightweight UI translators can learn quickly
cons: Feature set lags newer tools like Lokalise or Crowdin
Collaboration features thin for larger teams
Limited integrations with modern dev stacks
review.verdict: Cheap, straightforward string manager that still works, but feels behind modern localization platforms in polish.
review.best_for: Small teams syncing i18n files with translators on a budget
review.not_for: Mid-size teams needing branching, QA automation, or deep CI

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
